action.reasoning: Observation: Just retrained 3 epochs, all dev_eer=0.0003. Last checkpoint saved as best.pt. predict.py uses max_sec=6.0 but train uses 4.0. Decision: Submit eval on current best.pt (which is now last epoch's checkpoint).
